sn40.9:1.0.1: … "Here, friends, while I was alone in seclusion, a reflection arose in my mind thus: ‘It is said, "the signless concentration of mind, the signless concentration of mind." What now is the signless concentration of mind?’
sn40.9:1.0.2: "Then, friends, by nonattention to all signs, I entered and dwelt in the signless concentration of mind. While I dwelt therein my consciousness followed along with signs.
